message:
feat(compat-matrix): divergence category classification, actionable guidance, and scenario reports

Add DivergenceCategory enum with 5 variants (EngineBug,
IntentionalImprovement, CompatibilityDebt, EcosystemAmbiguity,
ReferenceRuntimeBug) and heuristic classify_divergence() function with
per-category actionable guidance strings:

- Extend CompatibilityObservationOutcome with divergence_category and
  actionable_guidance fields
- Add CompatibilityScenarioReport struct and evaluate_scenario() method for
  batched observation reporting with aggregated divergence counts and
  guidance (schema: franken-engine.module-interop-scenario-report.v1)
- Add esm-cjs-cycle-live-binding edge case to default matrix JSON
- New unit tests: evaluate_observation_assigns_divergence_category,
  evaluate_scenario_produces_deterministic_report
- New integration tests: default_matrix_includes_cyclic_import_edge_case,
  scenario_report_summarizes_divergence_categories_and_guidance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
